description: The ScaleElement component scales itself up or down depending on if it is the selected scale element in a Scale Group..

fields.Group: The group this belongs to. If there is a group in this component's parents, the group is auto filled into this field on attach.
fields.RespondToPhysicalTouch: Whether to make this item selected upon physical touch.
fields.RespondToRemoteTouch: Whether to make this item selected upon clicking via laser.
fields._scaleTarget: The field to drive in order to influence the scale of this slot when selecting/deselecting.

usage: Used along with a Scale Group to make a list of selectable items via touching them.
